user.title: Connect to CocktailPi
user.description: Enter the connection details for your CocktailPi machine.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with CocktailPi
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {host} no longer work. Enter a valid username and password.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to CocktailPi. Check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This CocktailPi machine is already configured.

order_cocktail.name: Order cocktail
order_cocktail.description: Starts producing a recipe on the CocktailPi machine.

recipe_id.name: Recipe ID
recipe_id.description: The numeric ID of the recipe to produce. Provide this or the recipe name, not both.

recipe_name.name: Recipe name
recipe_name.description: The recipe's name, resolved to an ID via a search. Provide this or the recipe ID, not both.

amount_ml.name: Amount (mL)
amount_ml.description: Amount to produce, in millilitres. Defaults to the recipe's default glass size if omitted.

is_ingredient.name: Is ingredient recipe
is_ingredient.description: Set to true if the ID/name refers to an ingredient recipe (e.g. a house-made syrup) rather than a regular cocktail.

config_entry_id.name: CocktailPi instance
config_entry_id.description: Only needed if you have more than one CocktailPi configured.

cancel_cocktail.name: Cancel cocktail
cancel_cocktail.description: Cancels the cocktail currently in production.

config_entry_id.name: CocktailPi instance
config_entry_id.description: Only needed if you have more than one CocktailPi configured.

pump_up.name: Prime pump
pump_up.description: Runs the pump forward to prime/fill the tube.

pump_back.name: Reverse-prime pump
pump_back.description: Runs the pump backward to empty the tube back into the bottle. Requires direction-control hardware.
